gearhaven_plaza.name: Cogwheel Plaza
gearhaven_plaza.description: Steam hisses from pipes and gears grind beneath your feet. Merchants shout over the clatter while travelers mingle in the plaza.

gearhaven_workshop.name: Gearhaven Workshop
gearhaven_workshop.description: Inventors toil with strange contraptions here, the air thick with the scent of oil and magic.

shadowfen_camp.name: Shadowfen Camp
shadowfen_camp.description: A dark encampment surrounded by murky waters where warriors of Umbra sharpen their blades.

shadowfen_bog.name: Shadowfen Bog
shadowfen_bog.description: Thick mist blankets the soggy ground and the croak of unseen creatures echoes all around.

neutral_crossroads.name: Crossroads
neutral_crossroads.description: A dusty intersection where caravans pause and news from all factions is traded.
